ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., touchdown, penalty) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home base */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's primary and secondary colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the season (e.g., '3 months') */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the season */,
  "punts" INTEGER /* Total punts executed */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "avg_yards" REAL /* Average yards per punt */,
  "inside_20" INTEGER /* Punts landed inside the 20-yard line */,
  "long_punt" INTEGER /* Longest punt of the season */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Total ties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "joined_year" INTEGER /* Year the player joined the team */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's image */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "team_id_home" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "team_id_away" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "game_length" TEXT /* Length of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id_home FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_home") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id_away FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_away") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "joined_year" INTEGER /* Year the coach joined the team */,
  "coach_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the coach's image */,
  "coach_bio" TEXT /* Coach's bio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trophies" (
  "trophy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trophy */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that won the trophy */,
  "trophy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trophy */,
  "year_awarded" INTEGER /* Year the trophy was awarded */,
  "trophy_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the trophy image */,
  "trophy_description" TEXT /* Description of the trophy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trophy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trophies_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the injury */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the injury was reported */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Expected duration of absence due to injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team holding the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., meet and greet, fan appreciation day) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player in the season */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds collected by the player */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of stat (e.g., passing, rushing, receiving) */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the report is about */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., team performance, player performance) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
